---
title: "Memoirs of Prince Rupert and the Cavaliers, including their Private Correspondence, Now First Published from the Original Manuscripts"
---

## Memoirs of Prince Rupert and the Cavaliers, including their Private Correspondence, Now First Published from the Original Manuscripts

**Author:** Eliot Warburton
**Date:** 1849
**Imprint:** London, Bentley

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
